name: Create a new user for Orange HRM
scenarioId: classpath:features/Admin_Module/Multi_User_Creation:Create a new user for Orange HRM
methodName: Create a new user for Orange HRM

testSteps.description: 1: Create a new user for Orange HRM ({User Name=Test0010, User Role=ESS, Status=Enabled})

exception.message:
WebDriver was unable to create a new instance of type class org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver
WebDriver reported the following message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. 
Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-6FQMBN1', ip: '192.168.0.148'
See below for more details.

children.description: Given click on the "Admin" of Menu Bar

And let's search for user if already existing?
| User Name |
| Test0010 |

When created a new user with below details:
| User Role | Employee Name | Status | User Name | Password |
| ESS | Orange | Enabled | Test0010 | Password# |

Then verify below message
| Message |
| Successfully Saved |

scenarioOutline:
Given click on the "Admin" of Menu Bar
And let's search for user if already existing?
|User Name|
|<User Name>|
When created a new user with below details:
|User Role | Employee Name | Status | User Name | Password|
|<User Role> | Orange | <Status> | <User Name> | Password#|
Then verify below message
|Message|

And logout from the Application
